rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee in component type annexes; use assign only in implementation annexes for output features.
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model exactly as provided; do not invent or copy external names.
generic_rules: Limit AGREE clauses to contracts that relate visible inputs to visible outputs with concrete bounds or named constants.
Ensure all expressions reference only scope-resolved identifiers from the component's declared features or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Annex blocks use syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
Use eq/const for internal definitions; assign only for output bindings in implementation scope.
anti_patterns: Do not embed AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants.
Never place guarantee statements in implementation annexes—only assign statements are permitted there.
irrelevant_topics: assume/guarantee placement strategy for target names
